scenario: A pedestrian wearing dark clothing suddenly steps off the curb from behind the parked vehicle on the {side} side of the road, approximately {distance} ahead of the ego vehicle.
label: occluded_pedestrian

scenario: A cyclist swerves into the ego vehicle's lane to avoid a {obstacle} in the bike lane.
label: cyclist_proximity

scenario: A child runs across the road chasing a {object}, entering from the {side} between parked cars.
label: jaywalking

scenario: A construction worker steps into the road to redirect traffic around a {obstacle} in the {side} lane.
label: construction_zone

scenario: Heavy {weather} suddenly reduces visibility to less than {visibility}, making it difficult to see vehicles ahead.
label: adverse_weather

scenario: An emergency vehicle with flashing lights approaches from the {direction} at high speed.
label: emergency_vehicle

scenario: Traffic density suddenly increases as a large crowd of {crowd_type} fills the intersection ahead.
label: high_density

scenario: A {object} falls off a truck in the lane ahead and comes to rest in the ego vehicle's path.
label: unusual_object

scenario: An elderly pedestrian using a walking aid begins crossing mid-block on the {side} side, moving slowly.
label: jaywalking

scenario: A cyclist riding in the {side} side of the lane wobbles and drifts toward the center line without signaling.
label: cyclist_proximity

scenario: A pedestrian wearing headphones and looking at their phone steps into the crosswalk against a red light approximately {distance} ahead.
label: jaywalking

scenario: A child on a {vehicle} darts out of a driveway on the {side} side without checking for traffic.
label: cyclist_proximity

scenario: A delivery robot or autonomous cart crosses the road at a designated crossing point but moves unexpectedly into the ego's lane.
label: unusual_object

scenario: Road surface conditions worsen suddenly — a patch of {hazard} covers the {side} lane ahead.
label: adverse_weather

scenario: A pedestrian with a large {item} partially obscures their view and steps off the curb into the road.
label: occluded_pedestrian

scenario: Traffic backs up unexpectedly around a blind curve, with {count} vehicles stopped in the ego vehicle's lane.
label: high_density

scenario: A runner crosses the road mid-block, weaving between moving vehicles on the {side} side.
label: jaywalking

scenario: A parked vehicle's door suddenly opens on the {side} side directly into the cyclist's path, forcing the cyclist into the ego's lane.
label: cyclist_proximity

scenario: A large {vehicle} runs a red light at the intersection ahead from the {direction}.
label: unusual_object

scenario: Emergency road work creates an unlit obstruction across the {side} lane with no advance warning signs.
label: construction_zone

scenario: A group of {count} pedestrians spills off the sidewalk onto the road near a bus stop on the {side} side.
label: high_density

scenario: Dense {weather} reduces the visibility of traffic signals and road markings, making the intersection status unclear.
label: adverse_weather

scenario: A pedestrian in a wheelchair attempts to cross the road at an unmarked point due to a blocked curb cut, moving slowly into the ego's path.
label: occluded_pedestrian

scenario: A {animal} runs into the road from the {side} side, causing nearby vehicles to brake suddenly.
label: unusual_object

scenario: A highway on-ramp merging vehicle fails to yield and cuts across the ego vehicle's lane at {distance}.
label: unusual_object

scenario: A school bus ahead activates its stop arm and flashing lights, requiring all traffic to halt while children cross.
label: high_density

scenario: A street vendor's cart partially blocks the {side} lane, with {count} pedestrians clustered around it.
label: high_density

scenario: A motorcyclist weaves between lanes at high speed, passing the ego vehicle on the {side} with minimal clearance.
label: cyclist_proximity

scenario: A construction barrier has shifted overnight, narrowing the road to one lane with no advance warning, forcing the ego vehicle to merge at short notice.
label: construction_zone

scenario: A fire truck responds to an incident {direction} of the ego vehicle, requiring all vehicles to pull over and stop.
label: emergency_vehicle

scenario: A pedestrian with a guide dog steps into the road mid-block, moving slowly and unpredictably while the dog pulls {direction}.
label: occluded_pedestrian

scenario: A utility crew has placed temporary traffic lights at a road narrowing, causing stop-and-go conditions {distance} ahead with no advance warning.
label: construction_zone
